description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and deploy, using the java:8 Docker image for the build job and the docker:git image with a docker:dind service for the deploy job. In the build stage add a job named build that runs ./gradlew clean build and publishes the file build/libs/deploy.jar as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job named docker-deploy that depends on build, echoes $REGISTRY_TOKEN, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with docker login -u romanowalex@mail.ru -p $REGISTRY_TOKEN, builds a Docker image with docker build --tag registry.gitlab.com/romanowalex/deploy:latest . and pushes it using docker push registry.gitlab.com/romanowalex/deploy:latest.
